children.name: hwCfgChgSeqIDReveralCount
children.description: The value of this object identifies the cycle count of the index of configuration change table.

children.name: hwCurrentCfgChgSeqID
children.description:
The value of this object identifies the ID of the current configuration change. 
                The value ranges from 0 to 65535. After the ID of the configuration change reaches
                the maximum value, the value of the ID starts from 1 again. 
                After the device is restarted, the value of the ID becomes 0.

children.name: hwCfgChgTableMaxItem
children.description: The value of this object identifies the maximum number of entries in hwCfgChgTable.

children.name: hwCfgBaselineTime
children.description: Specifies the time of system confiuration was baseline.

children.name: hwCfgChgTable
children.description:
This table is used to record configuration changes. 
                In this table, you can find the configuration change based on the specific index.

children.name: hwCollectTable
children.description:
This table is used to enable the NMS to send the collecting script to the device to trigger the collection, 
                and then monitor the collection status.

children.name: hwCollectNetManageId
children.description: The value of this object identifies the NMS ID.

children.name: hwCollectOperation
children.description:
This object indicates the instruction for the collection operation.
                Default value is stop.

children.name: hwCollectState
children.description: This object indicates the collection status.

children.name: hwCollectRowStatus
children.description: This object indicates the row status.
